headline: Does Iowa’s Data-Privacy Lawsuit Against OnStar Reframe the Bull Case For General Motors (GM)?
summary: In late February 2026, Iowa Attorney General Brenna Bird filed a lawsuit against General Motors and OnStar, alleging they collected and sold Iowans’ detailed driving data without informed consent, in violation of the Iowa Consumer Fraud Act. The case spotlights how GM’s push to monetize connected-vehicle services via programs like OnStar Smart Driver can create material legal, regulatory, and reputational risks alongside new revenue streams. We’ll now examine how these alleged data-privacy...
